projectTitle: Multi-Enhancement Implementation: Agent Aliases, Analytical Routing, Cross-Reference, Scholarly Narrative, and Curation

tasks.title: Tests: AgentAuthorityStore and schema
tasks.description: Write unit tests for AgentAuthority/AgentAlias dataclasses, AgentAuthorityStore CRUD operations (create, search_by_alias, resolve_agent), and schema creation. Tests use in-memory SQLite. TDD: tests written before implementation.

tasks.title: Schema and M3 contract updates for agent authorities
tasks.description: Define agent_authorities and agent_aliases tables mirroring publisher pattern. Update M3Tables/M3Columns/M3Aliases constants in m3_contract.py and m3_schema.sql.

tasks.title: Implement AgentAuthorityStore CRUD module
tasks.description: Create scripts/metadata/agent_authority.py with AgentAuthority and AgentAlias dataclasses, and AgentAuthorityStore class with ensure_tables(), add_authority(), search_by_alias(), resolve_agent() methods. Mirror publisher_authority.py pattern.

tasks.title: Tests: Seeding script and alias-aware query execution
tasks.description: Write tests for seed_agent_authorities.py (seed_from_enrichment, generate_word_reorder_aliases, cross-script detection). Write integration tests for alias-aware query execution in db_adapter.py. TDD: tests before implementation.

tasks.title: Implement seeding script and CLI command
tasks.description: Create scripts/metadata/seed_agent_authorities.py that populates authorities from existing data (group by authority_uri, generate word-reorder and cross-script aliases). Add seed-agent-authorities CLI command to app/cli.py.

tasks.title: Modify AGENT_NORM query path for alias resolution
tasks.description: Update build_where_clause() in db_adapter.py to use alias table JOIN for AGENT_NORM filters. Add graceful fallback via _agent_alias_tables_exist() helper when tables are absent.

tasks.title: E1 integration verification: seed and validate
tasks.description: Run seeding on production database, validate statistics (~2,400+ authorities, 3,000+ aliases). Run all E1 tests end-to-end. Verify alias-aware queries return expected results for Buxtorf, Mendelssohn test cases.
tasks.deliverable: Passing test suite, seeded production database

tasks.title: Tests: Analytical router detection
tasks.description: Write 25 unit tests for detect_analytical_query() covering Q14 (chronological), Q15 (geographic), Q20 (curation), edge cases (non-analytical queries, mixed signals). TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement analytical router and detection
tasks.description: Create scripts/chat/analytical_router.py with AnalyticalIntent enum (TEMPORAL/GEOGRAPHIC/PUBLISHER/LANGUAGE/SUBJECT/CURATION), AnalyticalQueryResult model, and detect_analytical_query() using two-layer signal+pattern detection.

tasks.title: Tests: Curation engine
tasks.description: Write 8-10 unit tests for CurationScorer covering temporal rarity, language diversity, notable items selection. TDD: tests before implementation.

tasks.title: Implement curation engine and full-collection aggregation
tasks.description: Create scripts/chat/curation_engine.py with CurationScorer. Add execute_aggregation_full_collection() to aggregation.py for collection-wide queries. Add generate_analytical_narrative() to narrative_agent.py.

tasks.title: Wire analytical routing into API and WebSocket
tasks.description: Add handle_analytical_query() to main.py. Insert detection into handle_query_definition_phase() after is_overview_query() check. Add matching logic to websocket_chat() handler. Extend ExplorationIntent for follow-up analytical queries.

tasks.title: E2 integration verification: Q14, Q15, Q20 end-to-end
tasks.description: Write and run integration tests simulating exact Q14 (chronological distribution), Q15 (geographic spread), Q20 (exhibit recommendations) queries. Verify correct routing, aggregation results, and narrative formatting.

tasks.title: Tests: Cross-reference models and engine
tasks.description: Write 13 unit tests for Connection/AgentNode models and cross-reference discovery engine using in-memory SQLite fixtures. Test shared-work, shared-place, shared-period connection types. TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement cross-reference data models and engine
tasks.description: Create scripts/chat/cross_reference.py with Connection, AgentNode models and core discovery functions. Pure functions operating on SQLite data. Add CROSS_REFERENCE to ExplorationIntent enum in models.py.

tasks.title: Tests: Enhanced comparison and narrative integration
tasks.description: Write unit tests for multi-faceted comparison (ComparisonResult, ComparisonFacets) and narrative agent cross-reference section generation. 10+ tests covering comparison edge cases.

tasks.title: Integrate cross-references into narrative, comparison, and formatter
tasks.description: Enhance generate_agent_narrative() with Connections section. Replace simple execute_comparison() with multi-faceted analysis. Update formatter.py with cross-reference formatting. Enhance follow-up suggestions with cross-reference prompts.

tasks.title: Wire cross-reference into API and exploration agent
tasks.description: Add CROSS_REFERENCE handler to API orchestrator in main.py for both Phase 1 (query results) and Phase 2 (exploration intents). Update exploration_agent.py to recognize cross-reference requests.

tasks.title: E3 integration verification
tasks.description: Run integration tests against real bibliographic.db verifying cross-reference discovery on actual data. Verify end-to-end flow from query to cross-reference narrative. Validate all E3 tests pass.

tasks.title: Tests: Thematic context matching and significance scoring
tasks.description: Write 13 unit tests covering theme matching (venetian_hebrew_printing matches venice+16c+hebrew), non-matching, significance scoring factors (date rarity, language rarity, agent authority). TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement thematic context module with 8 entries
tasks.description: Create scripts/chat/thematic_context.py with ThematicBlock/SignificanceResult/NotableItem models, THEMATIC_REGISTRY (8 pre-authored entries), get_thematic_context(), significance_score(), and get_notable_items() functions.

tasks.title: Tests: Pedagogical formatting
tasks.description: Write 3 unit tests for format_teaching_note() and citation formatting in formatter.py. Verify proper markdown output and edge cases.

tasks.title: Add pedagogical framing and wire into API
tasks.description: Add format_teaching_note() to formatter.py. Add optional thematic_context field to ChatResponse model. Integrate get_thematic_context() and get_notable_items() into handle_query_definition_phase() after agent narrative block.

tasks.title: E4 integration verification
tasks.description: Run integration tests against real database for 7 target queries (Q1, Q2, Q4, Q5, Q11, Q16, Q18). Verify thematic context appears for matching queries, notable items are scored correctly, and pedagogical framing renders properly.

tasks.title: Tests: Curator scoring and diversity selection
tasks.description: Write 25 tests for ScoredCandidate model, score_candidates() (using E4 significance_score or fallback), select_diverse() greedy algorithm, fetch_record_metadata() helper. TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement curator module
tasks.description: Create scripts/chat/curator.py with ScoredCandidate model, fetch_record_metadata() SQL helper, score_candidates() using E4 significance scoring, and select_diverse() greedy diversity-aware selection (~230 LOC).

tasks.title: Add exhibit formatting and exploration schema updates
tasks.description: Add exhibit-style formatting functions to formatter.py (~45 LOC). Extend ExplorationRequestLLM with recommendation fields for curation parameter parsing. Add CURATION to ExplorationIntent if not done in E2.

tasks.title: Wire RECOMMENDATION handler in API
tasks.description: Replace the static RECOMMENDATION stub in main.py with working curation logic that calls curator.score_candidates(), select_diverse(), and exhibit formatter. Handle both initial curation queries and follow-up refinements.

tasks.title: E5 integration verification
tasks.description: Run end-to-end tests for curation queries (Q20-style exhibit recommendations). Verify scoring, diverse selection, and exhibit formatting produce quality output. Validate all E5 tests pass.
tasks.deliverable: Passing test suite, verified curation output

tasks.title: Full regression and cross-enhancement verification
tasks.description: Run complete test suite across all enhancements. Verify no regressions in existing chat/query functionality. Run QA gold set regression. Validate that all 5 enhancements work together correctly in the unified API.
tasks.deliverable: Full passing test suite, regression report

milestones.title: Agent Name Alias System Complete
milestones.description: Agent authorities and aliases seeded in production DB. Alias-aware query execution working with graceful fallback.

milestones.title: Analytical Query Routing Complete
milestones.description: Analytical queries (distribution, curation) detected and routed correctly. Q14, Q15, Q20 queries produce meaningful results.

milestones.title: Cross-Reference Engine Complete
milestones.description: Entity relationships discovered and surfaced in narratives. Enhanced comparison with multi-faceted analysis. Cross-reference exploration intent working.

milestones.title: Scholarly Narrative Depth Complete
milestones.description: Thematic context, significance scoring, and pedagogical framing integrated. Target queries (Q1, Q2, Q4, Q5, Q11, Q16, Q18) show improved historian evaluation scores.

milestones.title: Curation Engine Complete
milestones.description: Exhibit-quality subset selection working with scoring, diversity selection, and exhibit formatting. RECOMMENDATION handler fully functional.

milestones.title: All Enhancements Integrated and Verified
milestones.description: Full regression passed. All 5 enhancements working together in unified API with no regressions.

criticalPath.description: Longest dependency chain: E1 (agent aliases) -> E3 (cross-reference, depends on E1) -> E4 (scholarly narrative, depends on E3) -> E5 (curation, depends on E4 and E2) -> Final verification
criticalPath.bottleneck: E4-T2 (authoring 8 thematic entries, 6h) and E3-T4 (cross-reference integration across narrative/comparison/formatter, 5h) are the largest single tasks on the critical path

parallelOpportunities.description: E1 and E2 can execute fully in parallel from day one. No shared dependencies.
parallelOpportunities.timeSaving: 21 hours (full E2 duration runs in parallel with E1)

parallelOpportunities.description: Within E1, T5 (seeding script) and T6 (query path modification) can run in parallel after T4 completes.
E3 can start as soon as E1 completes, while E2 may still be finishing. E2-T6 and E3-T1 can overlap.
parallelOpportunities.timeSaving: Up to 6 hours if E2 runs behind E1

parallelOpportunities.description: With two developers, one can work the E1->E3->E4->E5 chain while the other handles E2 and then assists with E4/E5.
parallelOpportunities.timeSaving: Estimated 30-40% total calendar time reduction with 2 developers

summary.tddPattern: Each enhancement follows test-first -> implement -> integrate -> verify. Test tasks (prefix 'Tests:') always precede their corresponding implementation tasks.
